_note: Standalone wet-room shower-room example. 1800x1500mm shower room with is_wet_room=true. Bath_zone_1 expands to the FULL floor area to 2.25m AFF per BS 7671:2018 §701 + IET GN7 wet-room commentary (no §701 sub-clause for wet-room expansion in verified file; generic §701 citation applies). 1 anchor (shower_position only — no bath). 2 existing fixtures, both compliant.

anchor_fixtures._provenance_note: Wet-room shower head extracted from architect Rev-B plan dated 2026-05-12; central position with linear floor drain; thermostatic mixer at 1500mm AFF on east wall.
